creator: bbradsu@mail.ru
text: My HP laptop with PCI-express wireless wifi is from 2010, and FreeBSD does not es compatible  my Broadcom BCM4313 wireless card at the gates of 2020.  On Linux this 802.11 WiFi driver (wlp3s0) works perfectly and I don't understand why it is not compatible with FreeBSD, please Add support for Broadcom BCM4313 as it affects many people.
